reviews.review_description: I found this app to be super affordable for the things it does. The environments are decent, and the best part is that it is really easy to stream videos from PC to my quest. It is basically drag and drop. And it streams videos with high bitrate from my PC. I hope it gets more features in the future and it doesn’t become and abandoned project.

NEX is a highly promising next-generation VR video player.
Its AI-powered 2D-to-3D conversion is truly impressive, delivering an unprecedented level of immersion for both classic movies and personal family videos!
With its clean interface, varied environments, and strong potential for future updates, NEX is a captivating application that could very well become the reference standard for VR video players.

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you for the praise and support! It means a lot to NEX, especially since it’s still in the early stages.

reviews.review_description:
I gave tried quite a few media apps (including Skybox, Moon played, Fluid, Special TV, Big screen, Virtual Desktop , 4VXR and DeoVR). This is now my favorite app out of all the ones listed above. 
I am not going to say that this app is perfect (and it is still being developed) however.with how well this plays movies along with lots of cool features and environment really IMO make this my favorite app for watching my movies (2D and 3D) that are stored on my PC. I would highly recommend taking the plunge with this app and I feel it is well worth the investment. Look forward to keep using this app in the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you! LOVE from NEXO❤️

reviews.review_description:
My new fave app on Quest.

Love how I can have easy access to movies on my Mac and be able to watch in 3D. The 3D effect isn't overcooked or cheesy, it's just right.

The only thing I have had problems 
with was adjusting things to thecorrect height- it varies between the different environments, but it may have been to do with my floor level settings on the headset. I've not had this issue in Skybox, so there's that.

If the devs are listening to- PLEASE add a 'grand theatre' environment- for watching stage shows, musicals, concerts etc. All the other cinematic apps are missing a trick and it would be perfect. ✨

developer_response.body:
Hi, the viewing height in different environments hasn’t been carefully calibrated yet. We’ll gradually fine-tune it to a more suitable level in future updates.

The grand theatre idea is great. I’ll pass it along to the dev team ❤️

developer_response.body:
The 5 minute trial starts when the app is launched, not when you decide to start watching a video. By your own description, you spent the entire trial exploring menus and settings. That’s why the trial ended.

The trial period is clearly stated in the store listing and functions exactly as described. I’m not sure why following the stated terms would be considered “unprofessional.”

reviews.review_description: i have no issues with this apart from when sitting in some enviroments you cannot see the options as the headrest of the seat is in your view it also cuts off the bottom of the screen (in Cinema Room) and no option i could find to adjust your height

developer_response.body:
Hi, theoretically this should not happen.

Please try holding down the Meta button on your controller to reset your current view, then recalibrate the floor height in the system settings.

My guess is that the Quest tracking or room setup may have glitched, which caused the viewing height in the cinema environment to be incorrect.

You can also join our Discord to contact us: https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

reviews.review_description:
UI is intuitive, better than in Skybox. Ability to turn 2D videos in 3D, stream from PC. Dev recently added hand-tracking too.
A few rough edges here and there, as expected for newly released software, but overall pretty solid. 
Gonna use this over Skybox from now on.

developer_response.body: Thanks. NEX was only released recently, so there are still many areas that need improvement. We’re working hard to fix issues and optimize the experience as quickly as possible. ❤️

reviews.review_description: Saw the Cinema scene somewhere and figured I'd give this a try. Glad I did. The environments look great and way more real than most players. Mono Lux is my favorite. It's simple but feels really nice, and you can even see the texture in the carpet which is pretty cool. Little stuff like that makes it feel way more immersive.

developer_response.body: Thank you ❤️

reviews.review_description:
Gave it a try last night. Purchased it 15 minutes later. High quality, very clean, lots of options. 

Of all of the environments, the Cinema is my favorite. 

I accessed the media on my SMB share without issues. In fact, when I selected SMB, it found the share on it's own.  I just needed to put the credentials in. I did not try to access media by USB because all of my media is on a network share.

developer_response.body: Thx! LOVE from NEXO ❤️

reviews.review_description: ***EDITED FROM MY EARLIER REVIEW*** I Hadn't noticed the buttons to change subs and languages in my pror review so I gave it an unfair rating. Everything works perfectly. A cool after thought is how quick it is. After launching Vex, youll be watching your video in seconds. Super convenient. The picture quality is stunning. Im changing my review to 5 stars and i happily purchased the full version!

developer_response.body: Thx❤️ LOVE from NEXO

reviews.review_description: Even in alpha stage, this app already feels incredibly polished. My favorite is the MAX Cinema environment, it’s honestly the most realistic and beautiful theater setting I’ve seen in any player. The dev is also very active and fixed the issue I reported pretty quickly.

developer_response.body: Thank you for loving MAX Cinema 🙏

reviews.review_title: NEX discord wont let me in!!
reviews.review_description: try to join discord to see how buyers like it. but wont let me join keeps asking if human....but give no way to prove it! even logged in to discord 1St. thats still not proof im human so how can i prove with no options given. so I may prove your worth buying?!?!?    O.O?

developer_response.body: You couldn’t get through Discord’s verification system, so why blame us for that? That’s an issue with Discord itself and has nothing to do with our App. It's really really unfair for us.

reviews.review_description:
The interface is simple and opiton menu covers all the flat and VR video source. 
I am using also Galaxy XR headset but there is no proper Video Player App on Google store like this. If this converted for Galaxy XR, it will be greatly appreciated.
Merci Lionel!

developer_response.body: Thanks, my friend ❤️

reviews.review_description:
I used other 2D to 3D tools before but the subscription was really annoying so I decided to try NEX Player. 
The result is not perfect but already very good and totally usable and the speed is solid. The best part is it is a one time purchase with no limits which makes a huge difference. 
Definitely worth trying.

developer_response.body: ❤️ Thx!

reviews.review_description: i finally figured out how to use it after like 4 hours and then when i tried to watch the movie 5 minutes in it literally popped up a add that i couldn't get out of for it's full version

developer_response.body:
This is not an ad. It is the full version unlock prompt that appears when the 5 minute trial period has ended.

The trial duration is clearly stated on the store page before download. By your own description, you spent the trial time exploring settings and browsing files before starting the movie, which means the trial had already expired.

**The app functioned exactly as described. This review is criticizing a clearly disclosed trial policy rather than the quality or functionality of the app itself.**

reviews.review_description:
I love the player, plenty of environments and options and the quality is amazing.
My only issue is I can’t convert my 2D movies to 3D - using fast option just brings blank screen and the quality option takes 15hours 🤣. Any help with this would be appreciated Edit: Thanks for the response, I've already joined the Discord channel and have asked the same question but still waiting on a reply. I also have a couple more questions regarding the interface and some of the options but these are best asked and resolved over on Discord. ***UPDATE**** I've now given 5 stars as I can now can get the 2D to 3D conversion working and its brilliant quality. Make sure you join the discord group as the DEV will answer any queries you have.

developer_response.body: Thx! Love From NEXO❤️

reviews.review_description: The app moves very well for this stage, the player is very detailed, I will definitely buy the app! Question: is there any chance that it will support multiplayer in the future? Otherwise,very good

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback and suggestion. This feature is already on our roadmap, but it will take some time to develop.

reviews.review_description: Local Media and PC Link is awesome! But, please add a Remote Desktop Player or Browser Player to make it even more useful. 🤩

I joined the alpha test through Reddit, and even though the player is still in its early stages, it really impressed me. The VR environments are fantastic, they honestly feel on par with Vision Pro quality.

developer_response.body: Hi, this is Nexo. Thank you for joining the alpha test. Your early support means a lot to us!

reviews.review_description: I’m deducting two stars because I’m disappointed: the 2D-to-3D conversion doesn’t work and there’s no technical support. I sent an initial email; they replied, asked me for some information, which I provided. I haven’t heard back for a week; I sent a second email, but nothing. I must have been blacklisted.

developer_response.body: Sorry, we’re just a small team of three, so our email responses may be a bit slow. Thanks for your understanding 🙏

reviews.review_description:
I actually quite like the player. However, I downloaded it specifically for the 3D conversion. Unfortunately, this doesn't work with local files on the Quest, but only via streaming from a PC. That's a shame, as the app offers me no added value compared to Skybox :-( And 5 minutes for testing the demo version is definitely not enough!

Mir gefällt der Player eigentlich ganz gut. Allerdings habe ich ihn mir wegen der 3D Konversion geladen. Diese funktioniert aber nicht mit lokalen Dateien auf der Quest, sondern nur über Streaming von einem PC. Schade, so hat die App für mich keinen Mehrwert im Vergleich zu Skybox :-(
Und 5 Minuten zum Test bei der Demo Version sind eindeutig zu wenig!

developer_response.body:
Hi, the Quest’s chip simply isn’t powerful enough to handle 3D conversion locally. It has to rely on the processing power of a PC. Otherwise we would have built this feature directly into the app.

This limitation is due to the hardware itself, and it is clearly stated in the app description. We hope for your understanding. 🙏

reviews.review_description: the environments are amazing and the picture quality is great , I wonder if you can have a remote player feature to watch streaming videos from pc ( not local files on pc) and if any plans on a multiplayer , great app

developer_response.body: Thanks. We’re planning to add support for streaming online content in a future update. (Need a long time tho)

reviews.review_description: Finally I can convert 3D using my AMD GPU!

developer_response.body: YES! 3D trans now supports AMD GPUs!

reviews.review_description:
Useless.

The trans to 3d conversations stops the 2d version of the film to not stream at all.
So you need to remove it so it plays again in 2d.

Also they will not let you get a refund even less than the 2 hours.

Please avoid, others are better

developer_response.body:
Please make sure your PC is using an NVIDIA GPU. AMD GPUs are not supported at the moment (this is noted in the app description).

You can also join our Discord to share more details so we can help you better:
https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

Also, just to clarify: as developers, we don’t have the ability to approve or deny refund requests. The entire refund process is handled by Meta. Thanks for your understanding 🙏

reviews.review_description: I’m really liking the quality of the Cinema environment! Is there a way to adjust the level of curve to the screen for a more immersive experience? Also, will there more cinematic environments in the future? Like a true big screen IMAX theater? Images from the “Project Hail Mary” IMAX screenings can be inspiring!

developer_response.body: Hi, we’ll consider adding a curved screen option in a future update.

reviews.review_description:
I've been trying out the NEX player on my Meta Quest and it's a very promising app. It catches your eye right away with a clean interface, and honestly, despite a few bugs, it's definitely worth checking out.

What I really like:
* 2D to 3D conversion: I'm incredibly impressed by this. The app does a great job adding natural depth to flat videos.
* Virtual environments: The environments like the cinema or the cozy cabin look really good. They stand out beautifully compared to the competition.
* NEX Link: For me, this feature works flawlessly, but you absolutely need a strong and stable Wi-Fi connection for it to run smoothly.

Things to keep in mind:
* Free version: The free tier is okay for getting a feel for the app, but it's just not enough for regular watching. The full version costs around $10 (about €9.50).
* Bugs: I've encountered a few minor technical issues and stability glitches that can be a bit annoying sometimes.

Overall, despite the few flaws, I'm really happy with it. NEX has a ton of potential to make a real mark on the market.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your review and feedback! If possible, please join our Discord so we can communicate and follow up more quickly:
https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

reviews.review_description: Hi to the Developers, I purchased your paid version but am having a problem. The streaming app is installed on my Nvidia GPU processor computer. 2D videos stream fine but when I convert them to 3d they refuse to play on my meta quest 3 headset. The titles appear in the headset control panel but there is no play button to activate them and no screen appears. In the computer app, it shows that they are converted to 3D and gives me the option to deconvert them back to 2D. I think your program will be wonderful if I can get it to play files in 3D but as of now, I am disappointed.  What should I do. Thank You I will revise my rating if I get an effective answer.

developer_response.body:
Hi, after converting the video to 3D using NEXLINK, you still need to stream the 3D video to your Quest through NEXLINK. There is no need to transfer the video to the Quest’s local storage. NEXLINK FAQ: https://nexplayer.net/linkfaq

If I misunderstood, plz join our Discord to communicate with us directly and share feedback: https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

reviews.review_description: La fonction AI 3D est géniale. Les autres apps sur le marché sont en abonnement et assez chères, alors que celle-ci, tu paies une fois et c’est bon, tu peux en profiter.

developer_response.body: Merci 🙏

reviews.review_title: Impressive ! but with some fix needed
reviews.review_description: the quality is quite insane, crazy quality and interface, with some nice features (3D IA) but why tracking mandatory, i want to watch my movies in pitch black (cf skybox)

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for the feedback. This issue has been noted and we’ll fix it in a future update.

reviews.review_description: 3d trans kills me, not every movie has a native 3d version, amazing

developer_response.body: Thank you❤️

reviews.review_title: Video playback via usb stops working
reviews.review_description:
The app was running fine, however after
 the new meta interface update I can no longer play my video files via usb
NEX please update your software

developer_response.body:
Hi, do you mean this started happening after a Meta OS update? It might be a compatibility issue we haven’t run into yet.

If you can, feel free to join our Discord so we can help you faster and more directly: https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

reviews.review_description: Bought the full version for IMAX. That part is great. Tried Monolux during the free trial. Didn’t expect much. Actually really nice. Simple but comfortable. Ended up using it a lot. Thanks to the devs.

developer_response.body: Thx ❤️

reviews.review_description:
I'm currently tried this on my Quest 3S. The UI looks very promising, but I encountered a critical issue regarding network playback:

1. SMB Bug: I can successfully connect to my local SMB server (hosted on a Raspberry Pi 4) and browse through the directories. However, the video files do not show up at all. Strangely, only image files are visible, but when I try to open or view them, they don't load either.

2. Feature Request: Native Jellyfin Integration
Since I mostly stream high-quality, cinematic movies and thrillers from my local server, it would be absolutely amazing if you could add native Jellyfin integration in the future rather than just relying on standard DLNA or SMB.

I love the direction this app is heading and look forward to this and, I am giving it 3 stars for now due to the broken SMB core feature, but I will happily update my rating to 5 stars once the SMB playback is fixed. Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body: Hi, could you please contact us at support@nexplayer.net so we can better assist you? We have a few questions.

reviews.review_description: This app opens up so many options for you entertainment choices on the quest.

developer_response.body: Thank you! ❤️

reviews.review_description: In the cinema environment you cant change height of seat so seats in front obscure your view. Also gives you 5 minutes of video playback per day but I barely got 5 seconds. A little Underwhelming first impressions. Only thing that appealed to me was that the the screen maybe bigger then in other leading apps

developer_response.body:
Hi, in the upcoming version you’ll be able to adjust the height of the cinema seats. If the seats in front are blocking your view, you can simply hold the Meta button on the controller to reset your view.

Also, the 5 minute trial in NEX starts counting from when the app is launched, not just when video playback begins.

Lastly, you’re welcome to join our Discord for easier communication:
https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

reviews.review_description: Just watched Sinners in this and I got Goosebumps!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you ❤️ From the developer, Nexo

reviews.review_description:
When I stream movies through DLNA servers, I can’t go back and navigate to my previous folders. Nex Player simply gets stuck in an endless loop.
This is inconvenient and frustrating because I have to keep exiting and reopening the app whenever I want to stream content from another folder.
Please fix this issue. Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Hi, we’re currently unable to reproduce the issue you described.

If possible, could you provide some information about your DLNA server setup so we can investigate further? You can contact us at support@nexplayer.net or join our Discord: https://discord.gg/xdFpe3D3G6

Thank you!

reviews.review_description: movies work great its comfortable but no mater what i do after a 3d conversion the movie twists and doubles up and isn't watchable after or 3d  ...i see promise so ill keep it and not get a refund

developer_response.body:
Please try selecting the SBS mode. If that doesn’t work, please refer to this NEXLINK guide. It should help: https://nexplayer.net/linkfaq
 If possible, please join our Discord and share more detailed feedback so we can help investigate the issue:
https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

reviews.review_description: Bought the full version. The 3D conversion works well but when I reboot my Mac, it loses all of the 3D conversions and Insve to start again . I am using the Nex link.

developer_response.body:
Hi, if the 3D conversion isn’t finished yet, restarting your Mac will cause the current progress to be lost. Since 3D conversion involves very complex computations, any unexpected interruption can corrupt the file.

It’s similar to a game. If you haven’t saved and the power suddenly cuts off, your progress will be lost.

If I misunderstood, please join our Discord so we can communicate more quickly:
https://discord.gg/QcstqsRAsP

reviews.review_description: Just streamed a SBS video . But it did not play in 3D. Flat screen only. Quality was low. And need a pc to convert a 2D to 3D.

developer_response.body:
Please read our product description carefully. We have clearly stated that the 3D conversion feature requires a PC equipped with an NVIDIA GPU, because the Quest’s chipset is not powerful enough to process 3D video locally.

I do not mean this as criticism. I simply wish to take this opportunity to respectfully ask all customers to read the product information carefully before purchasing, so as to avoid unnecessary expectations and misunderstandings.

reviews.review_description: I was excited about this app. I downloaded it. It said it was free once I downloaded it and try to use it for the first time it immediately said my free trail was up and needed $9.99 to buy it! Really? Come on please help.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback.

We've noticed that some users may reach the trial limit sooner than expected after completing the initial setup experience. We agree that this isn't an ideal first impression.

We're currently working on improvements to give new users a better opportunity to explore NEX before encountering any limitations.

We appreciate your feedback and your interest in the app.

reviews.review_title: Don’t be like any other video player vr
reviews.review_description: I gotta say the 3d is great over there but I wish I could find a way to not ruin the subtitle while watching in 3d but Please don’t be like any other video player with low quality videos or high price add on please I’m begging you DONT BE LIKE THEM!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks! 

If your subtitles are embedded directly into the video (meaning they’re part of the image itself rather than a separate subtitle track), the 3D conversion algorithm may not always be able to perfectly distinguish the subtitles from the rest of the scene. In some cases, this can cause the subtitles to look a little off in 3D.

This is something we’re continuously working on. It’s a long term optimization project, and as the algorithm improves with future updates, its ability to correctly identify and handle subtitles should become more and more accurate.

reviews.review_description:
I was ready to get robbed every month for 2D to 3D again, but NEX Player said nah.

My wallet is crying happy tears. I’m never going back. Five stars. Bless this app.

Pretty good cinema. Hope you have a web browser option soon.

Good product

developer_response.body: Thx! Web browser is on the way (need some time tho).

reviews.review_description: very poor app,picture is not very crisp clear like Skybox...Problem to sett ideal screen size for me...I can not make refund,tested about 20 minutes....dont buy it...!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Sorry to hear that NEX did not meet your expectations.

Picture clarity depends on the original video quality as well as the player settings. In NEX, the screen size, distance, and position can all be adjusted to suit different viewing preferences.

To better understand the issue, when you mention that it was difficult to set the ideal screen size, do you mean the virtual screen could not be made large enough or small enough for your preference?

Also, are you referring to the screen adjustment within the virtual environment? If so, could you tell us which virtual environment you were using and what adjustment limitation you encountered? For example, was the maximum size still too small, or was the minimum size still too large?

Refunds are handled directly through the Meta Store. However, if you're willing to give NEX another try, please feel free to contact us. We'd be happy to help you optimize the settings and improve your viewing experience. ❤️

reviews.review_description: Hello, i bought this app from my phone, from this account, but in the quest3 its says that my free trial ended and i have to buy it, fix it please

developer_response.body:
Hi,

First, please make sure that your headset and your phone are logged into the same Meta Quest account. If they are using different accounts, the purchase information will not sync between devices.

Second, please ensure that your Meta Quest headset is connected to the internet. Without an internet connection, the purchase status cannot be synchronized properly.

In most cases, if both of the above conditions are met, the app should automatically recognize your purchase when you launch it. If it does not, please try restarting your headset and opening the app again.

We would also like to clarify one point: when you say you purchased the app on your phone, did you purchase the full version upgrade (in-app purchase), or did you only obtain the base app itself?

Please note that the base app is free to download and use as a trial, so if you only acquired the app itself on your phone, you would not have been charged for it. The charge would only apply if you purchased the full version upgrade. If you would like access to the complete experience, the full version purchase is required.

Please let us know exactly what purchase appears in your Meta account transaction history, and we will be happy to assist further.

If you have any additional questions or need further assistance, please feel free to contact us at support@nexplayer.net.

reviews.review_description: Hi, good job, I cant seem to get zoom to work ? Also didnt realize it was a trial.....

developer_response.body:
By default, you can zoom in and out using the joystick up/down. You can also customize the zoom shortcut in the in-app settings.

Also, the MAX Cinema scene doesn’t support zooming because it’s designed to simulate a real theater screen with a fixed size.

reviews.review_description: I'm very happy with it so far.

developer_response.body: Thx ❤️

reviews.review_description: AI 3D kills me
Wow!
Plus besoin de chercher spécialement des films en 3D maintenant
3D trans is a must-have!

developer_response.body: thx❤️

reviews.review_description: You only need to pay once to unlock all the features, no ongoing subscription. I really like that model.

developer_response.body: Thank you, LOVE FROM NEXO
